name: Clara Pipeline A — Demo Call to Agent v1

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives POST with: {account_id, transcript_text} or {account_id, file_path}

nodes.name: Read File
nodes.notes: Reads transcript from disk if file_path provided

nodes.name: Extract Memo (Rule-Based)
nodes.notes: Swap with Ollama HTTP Request node for LLM extraction

nodes.name: Save to Disk
nodes.notes: Saves memo.json and agent_spec.json to outputs/accounts/<id>/v1/

nodes.name: Create Task Item
nodes.notes: Swap body with Asana API call when API key available

meta.description: Clara Answers Pipeline A — Demo Call → V1 Agent Spec
